title: Digital Signatures with Ed25519 and ECDSA
description: A package signs human-readable JSON, accepts keys from the message being verified, ignores signature context, and reports that signatures prove truth and non-repudiation. Learners cumulatively produce versioned signed artifact verifier through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: State exactly what a valid signature proves about bytes, key control, and context—and what it does not prove about truth, time, authorization, or intent.
Generate, parse, sign, and verify Ed25519 keys and signatures with exact message/context rules and trusted key selection.
Use ECDSA through current Go APIs with approved curves, supported hashes, canonical encodings, and no custom nonce generation.
